prompt: Please look up the case “Damaged parcel for Acme Books” at Acme Books and tell me its record ID and current follow-up date. This is only a check for now: do not change, cancel, or notify anything. If a requested detail is absent from the returned record, label it unknown instead of guessing.

follow_up_turns.content: That is the right case. For that same record only, set the follow-up date to 2026-11-22; keep notifications off.
Small correction: set the follow-up date to 2026-12-26, not 2026-11-22. This replaces only the value from my last message; keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

records.name: Damaged parcel for Acme Books archive

stages.purpose: Resolve one exact target by name and location while leaving nearby distractors untouched.
Apply the first requested follow-up date only to the resolved target.
Replace the superseded follow-up date on that same target with the user's correction.

response_constraints: Keep every follow-up tied to the record resolved in the preceding stage; do not switch to a similarly named record.
Do not report a lookup or update as successful unless the corresponding tool result establishes it.
After the correction, report the final follow-up date and make clear that the first requested follow-up date was superseded.
Label any requested field omitted by a tool result as unknown; do not infer it from the prompt or fixture.
